creator: demon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Oh, nevermind about my JAIL option comment=E2=80=A6



On 10 =D0=B4=D0=B5=D0=BA. 2013 =D0=B3., at 0:23, Dmitry Sivachenko =
<demon@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Also JAIL option seems to be obsolete?
> (No NAGIOSPOLLIP in configure.in, nothing to replace)
>=20
>=20
> On 10 =D0=B4=D0=B5=D0=BA. 2013 =D0=B3., at 0:21, Niclas Zeising =
<zeising@daemonic.se> wrote:
>=20
>> On 12/09/13 21:04, Dmitry Sivachenko wrote:
>>> Why did you enable all options by default?
>>> (OPTIONS_DEFAULT)
>>>=20
>>=20
>> That was a left-over from testing.  I wanted to test that all options
>> still built, and then forgot to remove them.  Attached patch is fixed =
to
>> not do this.  Sorry about that.
>> Regards!
>> --=20
>> Niclas Zeising
>> <ports.nagios-plugin.1.5.update.diff>
>=20
